gaps.feature: GraphQL xAPI — productConfiguration query and addItem with configuration
gaps.details: CFG-VAR-013 to 016 cover GraphQL for Variation sections, but Product/Text/File section types lack dedicated xAPI query/mutation test cases. Missing: productConfiguration query for all section types, addItem mutation with configurationItems for Product/Text sections, updateConfigurationItem for non-Variation sections, error handling for invalid config IDs.

gaps.feature: Admin UI — Configuration section CRUD for Product/Text/File types
gaps.details: Only Variation section has admin tests (CFG-VAR-017, 018). Missing: admin create/edit/delete for Product, Text, and File section types. Also missing: section reordering, isRequired toggle behavior, option quantity management in admin.

No tests verify how coupons/promotions interact with configured product pricing. Need: coupon applied to configured product total, promotional discount on configuration options, BL-PRICE-001 stacking with configuration pricing, cart-level vs line-level discount on configured items.

gaps.feature: Responsive/Mobile — configuration widget on small viewports
gaps.details: No mobile viewport tests. Configuration widget accordion, radio buttons, price totals, and file upload should work on mobile (375px). Touch interactions for accordion expand/collapse.

No A11Y tests. Missing: keyboard Tab/Enter/Space navigation through sections and options, ARIA roles for accordion pattern (aria-expanded, aria-controls), screen reader announcement of price changes on option selection, focus management when accordion opens/closes.
Only Firefox covered (CFG-PDP-015). Edge (Chromium-based) missing. Need at least 1 cross-browser test on Edge for configuration widget rendering and interaction.

gaps.feature: B2B context — configurable products in org context
gaps.details: No tests for configurable products in B2B org context. Missing: org-specific pricing applied to configuration options, B2B checkout with configured product (PO number), configured product in org cart isolation.

gaps.feature: Text section with predefined dictionary values
gaps.details: Text section type supports both freetext input AND predefined value lists (propertyDictItems). Current tests only cover freetext. Missing: text section with dropdown/select of predefined values, mixed freetext + predefined in same product.

gaps.feature: Edit configuration in cart — Product/Text/File sections
gaps.details: CFG-VAR-010 covers edit for Variation section. CFG-E2E-005 has E2E coverage but no dedicated storefront-level tests for editing Product section selection, changing text input, or replacing uploaded file via cart 'Edit configuration' button.
